    Desc = val_113["2"]
})

local v139 = v87:MakeTab({
    Title = 'اللاعب والاسم',
    Icon = 'rbxassetid://10723415903'
})
pl = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
DEFAULT_SPEED = 16
DEFAULT_JUMP = 50
DEFAULT_GRAVITY = 196.2
SpeedValue = 16
JumpValue = 50
GravityValue = 196.2
getHumanoid = function(arg1, arg2, arg3)
    local v1 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid')
    return v1
end

    PlaceholderText = 'اكتب سرعة اللاعب',

    Callback = function(arg1) --[[ No debug info available ]] end

    Callback = function(arg1, arg2, arg3)

    v1["WalkSpeed"] = 16
end

end

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage')
local v160 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild('RE')
local v161 = v160:WaitForChild('1RPNam1eColo1r')
local v162 = v139:AddToggle({
    Callback = function(arg1)
    task.spawn(function(arg1, arg2, arg3)
    local v1 = v161:FireServer('PickingRPNameColor', Color3.fromHSV(0.06666666666666667, 1, 1))
    task.wait(0.01)
    local v3 = v161:FireServer('PickingRPNameColor', Color3.fromHSV(0.13333333333333333, 1, 1))
    task.wait(0.01)
    local v5 = v161:FireServer('PickingRPNameColor', Color3.fromHSV(0.2, 1, 1))
    task.wait(0.01)
    local v7 = v161:FireServer('PickingRPNameColor', Color3.fromHSV(0.26666666666666666, 1, 1))
    task.wait(0.01)
    local v9 = v161:FireServer('PickingRPNameColor', Color3.fromHSV(0.3333333333333333, 1, 1))
    task.wait(0.01)
    local v11 = v161:FireServer('PickingRPNameColor', Color3.fromHSV(0.4, 1, 1))
    task.wait(0.01)

                local concat_4 = arg1 .. " está selecionado!"

    val_2.Name

                local v3 = v219:Set({
    val_2.Name
})
                local v4 = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()
                genv.Target = nil
                tick()
        end

    Callback = function(arg1, arg2, arg3)
                local StarterGui = game:GetService('StarterGui')
                game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore('SendNotification', {
    Icon = 'rbxassetid://6023426915',
    Text = 'Iniciando...',
    Title = 'Fling All Ball',
    Duration = 5
})
                warn("Fling All Ball: Iniciando...")
                local v4 = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()
                local v5 = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()
                    local concat_6 = "Flingando " .. val_6.Name .. " (1/1)"
                    local StarterGui = game:GetService('StarterGui')
                    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore('SendNotification', {
    Icon = 'rbxassetid://6023426915',
    Text = concat_6,
    Title = 'Fling All',
    Duration = 5
})
                    local concat_9 = "" .. "Fling All" .. ": " .. concat_6
                    warn(concat_9)
                    task.spawn(function(arg1, arg2, arg3)
            local v1 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid')
            local v2 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:WaitForChild('Backpack')
            local v3 = workspace.WorkspaceCom:WaitForChild('001_SoccerBalls')
            local concat_4 = "Soccer" .. game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Name
            local v5 = v3:FindFirstChild(concat_4)
            v5["CanCollide"] = false
            v5["Massless"] = true
            v5["CustomPhysicalProperties"] = PhysicalProperties.new(0.0001, 0, 0)
            local v9 = val_6.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart')
            local v10 = val_6.Character:FindFirstChild('Humanoid')
            local v11 = v5:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('BodyVelocity')
            local v12 = v5:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('BodyVelocity')
            v12:Destroy()
            local BodyVelocity14 = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
            BodyVelocity14.Velocity = Vector3.new(900000000, 900000000, 900000000)
            BodyVelocity14.MaxForce = Vector3.new(inf, inf, inf)
            BodyVelocity14.P = inf
            BodyVelocity14.Parent = BodyVelocity14
            workspace.CurrentCamera["CameraSubject"] = val_6.Character.Humanoid
end)
        end
})
            local v240 = v216:AddButton({
    Name = 'تطيير الكل - كنبة',
    Callback = function(arg1, arg2, arg3)
                        local StarterGui = game:GetService('StarterGui')
                        game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore('SendNotification', {
    Icon = 'rbxassetid://6023426915',
    Text = 'Iniciando...',
    Title = 'Fling All Couch',
    Duration = 5
})
                        warn("Fling All Couch: Iniciando...")
                        local v4 = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()
                        local v5 = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()
                            local concat_6 = "Flingando " .. val_6.Name .. " (1/1)"
                            local StarterGui = game:GetService('StarterGui')
                            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore('SendNotification', {
    Icon = 'rbxassetid://6023426915',
    Text = concat_6,
    Title = 'Fling All',
    Duration = 5
})
                            local concat_9 = "" .. "Fling All" .. ": " .. concat_6
                            warn(concat_9)
            end
})
            local v241 = v216:AddButton({
    Name = 'تطيير الكل - قارب',
    Callback = function(arg1, arg2, arg3)
                                local StarterGui = game:GetService('StarterGui')
                                game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore('SendNotification', {
    Icon = 'rbxassetid://6023426915',
    Text = 'Iniciando...',
    Title = 'Fling All Boat',
    Duration = 5
})
                                warn("Fling All Boat: Iniciando...")
                end
})

    'ميزة جديدة وقوية وذكية'
})
            local Players = game:GetService('Players')
            local UserInputService = game:GetService('UserInputService')
            local v250 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart')
            local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage')
